description_long: This object is a rectangular, box-shaped shampoo container labeled 'GAFT Shower Gel' with a capacity of 500 grams and marked as 100% organic. The packaging is made of a rigid material, likely plastic or coated cardboard, and features a large, centrally placed label on the front face. The label includes a prominent black square at the top, followed by the product name and details in bold, clear text. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative graphics aside from the label. The cap or closure mechanism is not clearly visible from any angle, suggesting it may be integrated into the top surface. The object appears sturdy and is designed to stand upright on flat surfaces.
description: A rectangular, box-shaped shampoo container labeled 'GAFT Shower Gel' with a minimalistic design and prominent front label. The packaging is rigid and designed to stand upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full label with 'GAFT Shower Gel', 500 gr., and 100% organic text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view, still showing the label but with less frontal detail and more depth of the box visible.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, with the label and text clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side-angled view similar to view 1, showing the label at an angle and the box's depth.
attribute_label_text: GAFT Shower Gel 500 gr. 100% ORGANIC Made in Piyon
attribute_bottle_silhouette: rectangular with flat top and bottom surfaces
